candidate.problem: The private_key regex matched only the block header, so redaction could leave body and footer text visible.
candidate.risk: Private key material could remain in opt-in prompt previews after a partial redaction marker.
candidate.decision: Extend private_key to match the full BEGIN/body/END block using dot-all non-greedy matching.

red.evidence: The new test failed because the body and footer remained after [REDACTED_PRIVATE_KEY].

green.evidence: The focused test passed after the private_key regex matched the full block.

full_verification.evidence: 10 UI helper tests passed, Vite build passed, 41 Rust library tests passed, 14 CLI tests passed, doc-tests passed, and strict clippy passed.

staged_checks.evidence: gitleaks scanned staged code and found no leaks.
